repository.asset_policy: RustRelay.Assets geometry/materials only; custom completed podiums are the sole non-repository meshes.

coordinate_system.origin: center of rank-1 pedestal at ground contact
coordinate_system.rotation: Euler XYZ degrees after import normalization
coordinate_system.authoritative_look_orientation: target/lookAt values override informational Euler angles

normalization_sequence: Load GLB and wait for textures.
Create a wrapper transform and move native content so the declared Anchor is at wrapper origin.

camera.Notes: Frame all three podiums with ~0.55 m breathing room above the center character. Use target/lookAt as authoritative.

scene_nodes.notes: Global origin; all authored coordinates are world-space in meters.

lights.Notes: Cool sky contribution with warm/dark ground color #21150E; no direct shadows.
Moved beyond the orbit envelope; sweeps the distant left junkyard backdrop without intersecting the camera.
Moved beyond the orbit envelope; sweeps the distant right junkyard backdrop without intersecting the camera.

atmosphere_and_post.name: Global fog
atmosphere_and_post.notes: Color #15191C; height falloff 0.42; start distance 2.5 m.

atmosphere_and_post.name: Local haze left
atmosphere_and_post.notes: Bounds center (-4.5,1.7,-2.8), size (4.0,3.4,4.0), noise scale 1.6 m.

atmosphere_and_post.name: Local haze center
atmosphere_and_post.notes: Bounds center (0,2.0,-3.2), size (5.0,4.0,3.5), noise scale 2.0 m.

atmosphere_and_post.name: Local haze right
atmosphere_and_post.notes: Bounds center (4.5,1.7,-2.8), size (4.0,3.4,4.0), noise scale 1.5 m.

atmosphere_and_post.name: Embers
atmosphere_and_post.notes: World bounds 15x7x8 m; upward drift 0.25 m/s; lifetime 2.4–5.0 s; orange emissive; no collisions.

atmosphere_and_post.name: Bloom
atmosphere_and_post.notes: Threshold 1.1; knee 0.55; limit bloom to practicals and podium emissives.

atmosphere_and_post.name: Color grade
atmosphere_and_post.notes: Contrast +0.12; saturation -0.08; warm highlights, cool shadows.

atmosphere_and_post.name: SSAO
atmosphere_and_post.notes: Strength 0.85; bias 0.025; half-resolution acceptable on mobile.

atmosphere_and_post.name: Depth of field
atmosphere_and_post.notes: Focus distance ~13.1 m; subtle only—leaderboard assets must remain readable.

theme_swap_kits.Placement_Rule: Cross with AKs, tips above shoulder line
Use lower in composition around crates
Cluster by rank; center receives largest mass
One barrel per podium, center plus extra crate
One launcher per podium; rank 1 gets raised hero angle
Vertical cluster plus loose horizontal rounds
Pile by rank; avoid rank-number plaque
Keep away from mannequin feet by 0.25 m
Scale to 4.5–5.0 m and suspend at y=3.8 m
Partially crop each vehicle; use different yaw

assumptions: Transforms are a concept-derived first pass from the generated 2D mockup, not measurements from an original 3D scene.
Native GLB pivots and units must be normalized at load time using AABB bounds.
The completed custom podium supplies rank geometry, number plaques, and orange emissive strips.
Runtime lights, fog volumes, and particles are scene entities rather than repository meshes; visible fixtures use RustRelay.Assets.
Small final adjustments of ±0.15 m and ±8° are expected after assets are loaded and visually inspected.
